name: MAQ Brandon C. Schierbaum FieldHouse
description:
We are offering two premium private pickleball courts to play doubles. A maximum of 12 players are allowed to sign up for each session in order to minimize wait times. Max wait
time will be one match per court.

Private Court Rentals are also available outside of the listed times!

Open Court Play - All Sign-ups MUST be done through the MINDBODY! 
Private Pickleball Court Rentals - Please inquire at gotmaq@yahoo.com!

Mobile MINDBODY Sign Up - https://get.mndbdy.ly/FZ2rHssyVyb
Desktop MINDBODY Sign Up -https://www.mindbodyonline.com/explore/locations/maq

Posted by Rick Warsinskey, NE Ohio PB Ambassador; contact Rick for his comprehensive guides on where to play PB in NE Ohio at rickwarsinskey@gmail.com or 1-216-409-2882

name: Morton Park
description:
Courts open to play on 8:30 AM to Dusk
Team Reach: Westside Outdoor Group; Code: WOPG
Team Reach for Beginners Group: MPBEGIN
 
Opened in July 2024

There are four dedicated pickleball courts with fencing for all four courts.   The courts look very nice.  

There are also five new tennis courts.  Three of the five are lined for pickleball so you can have up to 6 courts with rolling nets.    There are 6 rolling nets on the side of the courts. Given this, if rolling nets were put on the courts, you could have a total of 10 courts.   The Fairview Park HS tennis players take precedence for playing on the tennis courts.

A paddle rack to organize order of play of player waiting was installed.  The older can take up to 19 paddled.

Restrooms are open when Splash Park is open.

Posted by Rick Warsinskey, NE Ohio PB Ambassador; contact rick to get his comprehensive online guides on where to play PB in NE Ohio at rickwarsinskey@gmail.com or 1-216-409-2882.

name: SSC The Courts
description:
The Sculpt Sports Complex (SSC) is looking to expand its pickleball program.  

Right now, they have the capacity to have up to four nets.  They currently offer renting the courts at $60 an hour for two courts. At least two courts have to be rented at one time.  Courts are available throughout the day but many not be available some periods when school is in session.  To rent a court go to this link and fill out the inquiry form;
https://www.sculptsportscomplexes.com/strongsville

The Strongsville SSC is looking expand their program to Open PB and leagues.
